title: Session 04 — Dangerous Experiments
bodyText:
# What happened
Judy agreed to help: the source is in the **Underdark**, and she might brew a temporary fix. She left alone through her **meat wall**, leaving the party house-sitting. They sampled [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s concoctions and slept; [[pc-varen|Varen]] snooped and heard the basement doors breaking — the experiments had advanced to an unknown **stage 4: the infected dead rise**. The party took positions as the door burst open.
